content: Bug: submit_for_processing() in invoices.rs ran ML categorization and workflow engine but never assigned the invoice to a workflow queue (no queue_items row, no current_queue_id update). Fixed by adding queue lookup + move_item + SQL update after the workflow engine returns final_status. Mapping: Approved/ReadyForPaymentâ†’Payment queue, PendingApprovalâ†’Approval queue, Rejected/Voided/Paidâ†’no queue (terminal), defaultâ†’Review queue. Non-fatal: if no queue exists for tenant, logs warning and continues.
summary: Fixed ML category suggestions never reaching workflow state
